1.content:
You and Emma had been with each other for a year now, roughly the same time Sarah and Mike disappeared. Unfortunately for you, you never made that connection, after all, why would you, Sarah was only your neighbour, she probably moved out of her parent's house to live with Mike.

You still remember the day that you and Emma met, you were walking down town and felt a sudden urge to go into this cafe, Emma was at the counter, looking rather cute in her polo shirt and hair tied back. You felt an instant connection and she felt it too.

Tonight was the anniversary since you started dating and as luck would have it, your parent's weren't home. So after a nice date, you invited Emma back to your place. As soon as you stepped through that door a primal urge took over and you were in your room stripping off within a minute.

You passionately kissed Emma as you both fell onto your bed. "Oh, Mike..." you said as you looked into Emma's eyes, while you were on top of her. "I've been waiting for this day for over a year now,"

"Me too, Sarah..." Emma replied.

You didn't know why you said those words but neither you or Emma cared so you kept thrusting until you eventually climaxed. Out of energy you rolled beside Emma and panted as you looked directly into her eyes. "What was that about?" you asked now coming to your senses.

"I don't know but... ahh!" she screamed and covered herself up. You turned your head and standing at the end of your bed, completely naked was Mike and Sarah.

"What the fuck?" You screamed wondering how they got in your room and why they were naked.

"Sarah... they are not suppose to be freaking out, why are they freaking out?" Mike asked as he covered his junk.

"Well we did spend a year with both of them, so maybe they're players now..." Sarah bit her lip. "Sorry about this, John."

"You too Emma," Mike added.

You pulled up the covers so you and Emma couldn't see their bodies. You turned back towards Emma. Who was equally confused as they are. "Who the fuck are those people? Why are they naked and how does the guy know my name? Is this some sort of perverted game?" Emma asked recalling what Sarah said.

"I'm as clueless as you, Sarah's my neighbour and Mike is her boyfriend but I've not seen either of them in over a year."

Sarah tapped the blanket, and you lowered it a little just to see her face. "I can explain all that but you're not going to like it. But first can you help me get some clothes from my house, Mike should have some too."

"Sarah..." Mike sighed at her request.

"What? Oh... sorry my bad," Sarah realized.

A shadow grew along the wall and a figure stepped out. "A new round has commenced. The game is as follows, you must sneak into Sarah's house and bring back clothes belonging to both Mike and Sarah to this room. The rules, you must not get caught. The loser is the person who brings back the least amount of clothes or gets caught. The loser will give up the rights to wear clothes for twenty-four hours. You have until sunrise." The figure explained as a wheel appeared from the wall. "Now for the challenge... you must do this task as..." it spun the wheel...
1.title: It begins with sex

13.content:
As soon as the wheel landed on invisibility, everything went dark, you were completely blind and you weren't the only one.

"My eyes!" Emma screamed. "I can't see!"

"Neither can I," Mike added a bit more calm.

"Of course we need to do this blind," Sarah remarked. "Well come on Mike, we've got a game to win." You heard something crash into you wall. "Ow.." Sarah complained and then a few seconds later your bedroom door opened. "Fair warning, these games can have multiple losers," she informed you as she left. You heard more banging in the hallway as someone fell down the stairs.

"This is insane," Emma climbed out of the bed, you heard her stumble around for a bit before you heard her phone unlock. "Hey Jackie, can you pick me up? I'm at..." she told her friend your address before she slowly made her way out of the room.

"Emma where are you going?" you plead. "You're going to lose the game, we're invisible remember!"

"I very much doubt that!" She snaps. "This has been one fucked up night, so I'm going home. You can play your perverted games, I'm done." Emma made her way downstairs carefully and left the house. You probably couldn't chase after her even if you wanted to. So instead you got up and headed to Sarah's house.

When you got there, the door was already unlocked, you made your way through the house carefully, as you followed the noise upstairs. You bumped into Sarah as you entered her bedroom, which was awkward given that you were both naked.

"Sorry," you blushed as you reached out, feeling her shoulders so you could side step her. She doesn't say a word and you feel her leave. You feel an open draw and as you reach in you find her underwear, as the draw is already open you figured she's already grabbed that, so you walk around further and find her closet and grab one of her dresses. You wouldn't even know to look for Mike's stuff, so you don't.

When you return outside you hear a car pull up. So you drop the dress, knowing you can't get caught with it. "Emma?" you hear someone call.

"I'm here Jackie..." Emma replies, the sound is at the end of your driveway.

"Emma.. you're invisible..." Jackie says in disbelief. Emma has now lost the game for being caught. Jackie...
13.title: Invisible People

131.content:
"Oh there you are," Jackie exclaimed. "I guess you just lost the game," there was a deviant tone to her voice.

"Why am I naked?!" Emma screamed softly. "And how do you know about the game?"

"Never mind that, I assume Mike is around. What's your task anyway? I assume invisibility is a part of it and being naked is the punishment for losing."

"Where are you going?" Emma did another hushed scream. "Get back here and take me home!"

"No thank you, I think I might catch the others, make them lose too," Jackie brushed Emma off, not caring about her current situation. "You know I'm honestly surprised with you Em, I thought Mike was going to be stuck a lot longer than he was, still a whole year is pretty funny. Though I don't think you'll appreciate it when I tell you where he was this whole time."

"Fuck it's Jackie..." you heard Mike's voice behind you. You push him back into the house and shut and lock the door.

"Who's Jackie?" You asked still holding onto Mike's shoulder.

"Another player, she's also Emma's older sister," Mike explained. "She's jealous of my relationship with Sarah, she's always making us lose."

"So you just so happen to know my girlfriend and her sister and she's also playing the game? Please tell me this is a coincidence."

"Actually you know Emma because of Sarah and me..." Mike says slightly embarrassed.

"Wait... Sarah was my..." you realized now why you called Emma, Mike "And you were..." you didn't even want to finish that thought.

"Yes, but now we've got a problem, we're blind and we need to make it back to your room, while Jackie is out to get us. Unless you want to be naked were everyone can see you."

"Okay I get it so let's work together..." you suggest
131.title: Jackie's a player

info.brief_description: A group of young adults play a game of transformations.
info.description:
Back in high school your neighbour and her friends ended up being dragged into a dangerous game, they have been playing several years for now, though players have come and gone during that time. Now it was your turn to play the game.

Characters:
John, 19, main character - As the protagonist his description can be built as the story goes on.

Emma, 20, John's Girlfriend - Emma has curly brown hair, green eyes and freckles. She's a tiny girl just over 5 feet, she's not athletic nor is she chubby. She works at the local cafe.

Sarah, 23, Jonh's Neighbour - Sarah has long blonde hair, blue eyes and pale skin. She's 5'10" and keeps fit and maintains a well balanced diet. John hasn't seen Sarah for over a year now, though she's often in his dreams.

Mike, 23, Sarah's Boyfriend - Mike was balding the last time you saw him, though he had dark hair, brown eyes and pale skin. He's 6'1" and has an athletic build as well. Like Sarah Mike hasn't been around in over a year.

Mike and Sarah have other friends that'll pop in and out of the story.

Rules:
No Underage Characters
